task_summary: Create Oracle PL/SQL + Redmine Automation Config template and update template registry
constraints: Template format must match existing redmine-rails.md structure
All required Automation Config sections must be present (Issue Tracker, Source Control, PR Rules, PR Description Template, Build & Test)
Include Oracle-relevant optional sections (Local Deployment, Agent Overrides, Retry Limits, Decomposition, Pipeline Profiles, Error Handling)
Use generic placeholders, not project-specific values
success_criteria: examples/configs/redmine-oracle-plsql.md exists with valid Automation Config format
Template includes comments/placeholders for user customization
skip_rationale: Composite complexity 2, confidence 0.95. Task is fully specified with format reference and content sources. No research, brainstorming, specification, or TDD needed for a markdown template addition.

destructive_ops.evidence: Task creates new files and adds table rows. No deletion or overwriting.

credential_handling.evidence: Template uses generic placeholders, no actual credentials involved.

irreversible_side_effects.evidence: All changes are local file edits, no external side effects.

elevated_privileges.evidence: No system-level operations, only file creation and editing.

ambiguous_scope.evidence: Exact file paths specified: examples/configs/ and skills/template/.

network_irreversibility.evidence: No DNS, CDN, or network configuration changes involved.

supply_chain_ops.evidence: No package publishing or registry operations involved.

billing_quota_ops.evidence: No cloud resource provisioning or billing changes.

system_service_effects.evidence: No system services, daemons, or cron jobs affected.
